idea-plugin.name: Rider Debug API Bridge
idea-plugin.description:
Exposes Rider debugger operations via the built-in HTTP server REST API. Designed to work with the rider-debug-mcp MCP server. Endpoints exposed:
  • POST /api/debug/breakpoints - Add breakpoint
  • GET /api/debug/breakpoints - List breakpoints
  • DELETE /api/debug/breakpoints/{id} - Remove breakpoint
  • POST /api/debug/start - Start debug session
  • POST /api/debug/stop - Stop debug session
  • POST /api/debug/pause - Pause execution
  • POST /api/debug/resume - Resume execution
  • POST /api/debug/stepOver - Step over
  • POST /api/debug/stepInto - Step into
  • POST /api/debug/stepOut - Step out
  • GET /api/debug/variables - Get local variables
  • POST /api/debug/evaluate - Evaluate expression
  • GET /api/debug/stackTrace - Get stack trace
  • GET /api/debug/threads - Get thread list
